title: thermopsis mongolica subsp. schischkinii
intro: Thermopsis mongolica subsp. schischkinii, also known as Mongolian goldenbanner, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family, known for its vibrant yellow flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thermopsis mongolica subsp. schischkinii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and fever.
